text:
Windows Server Lab - Classroom IT Infrastructure
Tools: VMware, Windows Server, Active Directory, GPO, DNS, File Server, RDP
Configured Active Directory with OUs and user groups, enforced security policies via GPO, set up DNS for internal resolution, and managed file access through NTFS permissions resulting in a centrally managed system with controlled user access across all machines.
embedding_text:
Windows Server Lab - Classroom IT Infrastructure
Tools: VMware, Windows Server, Active Directory, GPO, DNS, File Server, RDP
Configured Active Directory with OUs and user groups, enforced security policies via GPO, set up DNS for internal resolution, and managed file access through NTFS permissions resulting in a centrally managed system with controlled user access across all machines.
